sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60763" key="kumbali/stria" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κυμβᾰλ-ίστρια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, fem. of foreg., Lat. <sense id="n60763.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cymbalistria</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1026.tlg001:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Petron.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
